display_text: Shadow of Vengeance. Cost: 0 (Neutral / Event): A unique non-purchasable item. Upon death, you spawn a powerful illusion that deals 100% damage and takes 150% damage for 30 seconds. The illusion can cast all basic spells, acting as a persistent threat after your hero falls. Stats: Illusion Duration: 30s, Outgoing Damage: 100%, Incoming Damage: 150%.
